tool_input.command:
cd /home/sites/phlix/phlix-contracts
echo "### CONTRACTS ###"
npm install 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "--- lint ---"; npm run lint 2>&1 | tail -6
echo "--- typecheck ---"; npm run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -6
echo "--- build ---"; npm run build 2>&1 | tail -6
echo "--- test ---"; npm run test:run 2>&1 | tail -6
